title: Staff AI Engineer - AI Creator
company_focus: Data and AI skills education platform
description:
About DataCamp

DataCamp's mission is to empower everyone with the data and
AI skills essential for 21st-century success. By providing
practical, engaging learning experiences, DataCamp equips
learners and organizations of all sizes to harness the power
of data and AI. As a trusted partner to over 17 million
learners and 6,000+ companies, including 80% of the Fortune
1000, DataCamp is leading the charge in addressing the
critical data and AI skills shortage.

About the role

Research has consistently shown that one-on-one tutoring
dramatically outperforms traditional classroom instruction—a
finding known as Bloom's 2 Sigma Problem. Despite decades of
awareness, no solution has successfully delivered
personalized tutoring at scale. Until now.

We’re building an AI Tutor that feels less like software and
more like a world-class personal coach—guiding millions of
learners in real time, adapting to their goals, and
unlocking faster, deeper understanding at scale.. You will
work on the core AI system that delivers real-time, adaptive
learning experiences to learners. If you're excited about
building the future of human learning, this role is for you.

About you

You’re a strong builder who thrives on turning cutting-edge
AI capabilities into real, high-impact products. You operate
with high ownership, move quickly, and care deeply about
quality—balancing experimentation with disciplined
execution.

You’re comfortable working in ambiguity but don’t wait for
perfect direction—you break down problems, make progress,
and iterate. You want to work on systems that matter,
alongside people who are pushing the boundaries of how AI
can transform learning.

Responsibilities

- Own the design and implementation of key components of the
  AI tutoring system, including prompt architectures,
  agentic workflows, and adaptive behaviors.
- Drive experiments end-to-end—shipping, measuring, and
  iterating to improve learning outcomes and model
  performance.
- Build production-grade systems that integrate LLM
  capabilities into user-facing experiences with
  reliability, speed, and scalability.
- Translate product and pedagogical goals into concrete
  technical solutions, working closely with product,
  content, and design.
- Rapidly prototype and deploy new model capabilities,
  bridging the gap between research breakthroughs and real
  user impact.
- Strengthen system quality through robust testing,
  monitoring, and iteration—ensuring safe and consistent
  behavior at scale.
- Raise the bar through strong code, pragmatic technical
  decisions, and active participation in design and code
  reviews.

QualificationsTechnical

- Proven experience building and shipping LLM-powered products
  in production environments.
- Strong prompt engineering skills and hands-on experience
  with agentic workflows or multi-step model interactions.
- Solid grasp of experimentation—comfortable designing,
  running, and interpreting experiments to drive
  improvements.
- Strong software engineering fundamentals (Python), with
  experience building scalable systems and working in modern
  production environments.

Product & Pedagogy

- Strong product instincts—able to connect model behavior to
  user experience and outcomes.
- Interest in building effective learning experiences;
  curiosity about how people learn and where AI can
  accelerate that.
- Ability to work closely with non-engineering stakeholders to
  ship cohesive, user-centered solutions.

Character & Collaboration

- High ownership and bias for action—you move things forward
  without waiting for perfect clarity.
- Comfortable operating in fast-moving environments with
  evolving constraints.
- Clear communicator who contributes to a strong, low-ego
  engineering culture.

Why Datacamp?

Joining DataCamp means becoming part of a dynamic, creative,
and international start-up. Here are just a few of the
reasons why you’ll love being on our team:

- Exciting challenges: Face new technical challenges daily,
  keeping your work engaging and rewarding.
- Competitive compensation: We offer a competitive salary with
  attractive benefits.
- Flexibility: Benefit from flexible working hours because the
  future is flexible!
- Continuous learning: Access a yearly learning budget for
  conferences & training to support your professional
  growth.
- Global retreats: Participate in international company
  retreats, fostering a global team spirit.
- Equipment: Yearly refreshment of your IT Equipment budget
  for your home working setup.
- Amazing team: Collaborate with a truly exceptional
  team—seriously, we’re awesome!

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building LLM-powered AI tutoring
systems, including prompt architectures, agentic workflows,
and adaptive behaviors. The position requires hands-on work
implementing and deploying AI/LLM capabilities, not just
supporting infrastructure for others.
